creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Upon routine testing of the KDE option of sysutils/desktop-installer, I noticed that my test machine went to sleep after a short time after logging into KDE.

I don't think this is the best default, given that:

1. suspend/resume doesn't work on all hardware
2. FreeBSD machines often have some sort of remote access enabled

I'd suggest tweaking the appropriate port to change the default to lock screen.  This will lead to better first impressions for new FreeBSD users.
